_doc: Manual overrides for the scraped raid boss list. Applied by
scripts/build_zones_db.py during the zone_bosses load step.
Each top-level key is the EXACT zone name as it appears in
eq2_zones.cleaned.json (and therefore in the zones table).
Each value is { "exclude": [mob_name, ...] } to drop scraped
false-positives. Names are case-insensitive on match.
Keys starting with '_' (like this one) are ignored by the loader
so we can keep documentation in the same file.
Spot the false-positives by running scripts/dev/scrape_eq2i_raids.py
scraped as an encounter that isn't actually a raid boss (zones,
lore characters, NPCs that happen to be wikilinked from the zone
